entry.title: Major service outage (resolved)
entry.content:
resolved — The platform-wide outage has cleared. Any remaining component issues are tracked individually.

investigating — Automated monitoring detected that multiple services are affected (Application API, Authentication & SSO, Social Feed, HR & Organization, Notifications & Email, Database, Background Jobs). Our team has been alerted.

entry.title: Application API degraded performance (resolved)
entry.content:
resolved — Application API has recovered and is fully operational again. Automated monitoring confirms healthy responses.

investigating — Automated monitoring detected that Application API is responding slowly or partially. Our team has been alerted.

entry.title: Background Jobs outage (resolved)
entry.content:
resolved — Background Jobs has recovered and is fully operational again. Automated monitoring confirms healthy responses.

investigating — Automated monitoring detected that Background Jobs is unreachable / failing health checks. Our team has been alerted.

entry.title: Database outage (resolved)
entry.content:
resolved — Database has recovered and is fully operational again. Automated monitoring confirms healthy responses.

investigating — Automated monitoring detected that Database is unreachable / failing health checks. Our team has been alerted.

entry.content:
resolved — Notifications & Email has recovered and is fully operational again. Automated monitoring confirms healthy responses.

investigating — Automated monitoring detected that Notifications & Email is unreachable / failing health checks. Our team has been alerted.

entry.content:
resolved — HR & Organization has recovered and is fully operational again. Automated monitoring confirms healthy responses.

entry.title: Application API outage (resolved)
entry.content:
resolved — Application API has recovered and is fully operational again. Automated monitoring confirms healthy responses.

investigating — Automated monitoring detected that Application API is unreachable / failing health checks. Our team has been alerted.

entry.title: Service disruption — platform unavailable (resolved)
entry.content:
resolved — Service has been restored. The application is reaching its database again and all endpoints are responding normally. We are monitoring to confirm full stability and will follow up with a post-incident review.

identified — We have identified the cause: the application is currently unable to reach its database, so the platform is unavailable. The database itself is healthy; we are working to restore connectivity as our top priority.

investigating — We are investigating elevated errors and failed or slow requests affecting some users, related to database connectivity. Parts of the app may be intermittently unavailable. We will post updates as we learn more.

entry.title: Database degraded performance (resolved)
entry.content:
resolved — Database has recovered and is fully operational again. Automated monitoring confirms healthy responses.

investigating — Automated monitoring detected that Database is responding slowly or partially. Our team has been alerted.
